debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
C : Category α
D : Category β
F G : Functor α β
η : @CategoryInContext.NaturalTransformation α β C D F G
h : @CategoryInContext.IsNatIso α β C D F G η
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
⊢ comp
      (have this := @h X;
      (fun f hf => f.inv) (Classical.choose ⋯) ⋯)
      (Functor.homF f) =
    comp (Functor.homF f)
      (have this := @h Y;
      (fun f hf => f.inv) (Classical.choose ⋯) ⋯)

failed_attempts:
have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX; choose iX hiX using hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY; choose iY hiY using hY
    rw [← Category.comp_id (arrow X ≫ F.homF f), ← iY.hom_inv_id, assoc, hiY,
        ← assoc (F.homF f), ← η.naturality, ← hiX, assoc, assoc, iX.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

let iX := Classical.choose (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h X))
    let iY := Classical.choose (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h Y))
    have hX : iX.hom = η.arrow X := Classical.choose_spec (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h X))
    have hY : iY.hom = η.arrow Y := Classical.choose_spec (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h Y))
    dsimp [arrow]
    calc
      iX.inv ≫ F.homF f
      _ = iX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ (iY.hom ≫ iY.inv) := by rw [iY.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
      _ = iX.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ iY.hom) ≫ iY.inv := by simp only [assoc]
      _ = iX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ iY.inv := by rw [hY, η.naturality]
      _ = (iX.inv ≫ iX.hom) ≫ G.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by rw [← hX]; simp only [assoc]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by rw [iX.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX; choose iX hiX using hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY; choose iY hiY using hY
    rw [← id_comp (G.homF f), ← iX.inv_hom_id, assoc, hiX, η.naturality,
        ← assoc, ← hiY, iY.hom_inv_id, comp_id]

have inv_hom_id (Z : α) : arrow Z ≫ η.arrow Z = id := by
      have := h Z
      rw [iso_iff_isIso] at this
      choose i hi using this
      rw [←hi, i.inv_hom_id]
    have hom_inv_id (Z : α) : η.arrow Z ≫ arrow Z = id := by
      have := h Z
      rw [iso_iff_isIso] at this
      choose i hi using this
      rw [←hi, i.hom_inv_id]
    calc arrow X ≫ F.homF f
      _ = arrow X ≫ (F.homF f ≫ id) := by rw [comp_id]
      _ = arrow X ≫ (F.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ arrow Y)) := by rw [hom_inv_id]
      _ = arrow X ≫ ((F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ arrow Y) := by rw [←assoc]
      _ = arrow X ≫ ((η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ arrow Y) := by rw [η.naturality]
      _ = (arrow X ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f)) ≫ arrow Y := by rw [←assoc]
      _ = ((arrow X ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f) ≫ arrow Y := by rw [←assoc]
      _ = (id ≫ G.homF f) ≫ arrow Y := by rw [inv_hom_id]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ arrow Y := by rw [id_comp]

have inv_hom_id : ∀ Z, arrow Z ≫ η.arrow Z = Category.id _ := fun Z => by
      have := h Z; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at this
      choose i hi using this
      change i.inv ≫ η.arrow Z = _
      rw [← hi, i.inv_hom_id]
    have hom_inv_id : ∀ Z, η.arrow Z ≫ arrow Z = Category.id _ := fun Z => by
      have := h Z; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at this
      choose i hi using this
      change η.arrow Z ≫ i.inv = _
      rw [← hi, i.hom_inv_id]
    calc
      arrow X ≫ F.homF f 
      _ = arrow X ≫ F.homF f ≫ Category.id _ := by rw [comp_id]
      _ = arrow X ≫ F.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ arrow Y) := by rw [hom_inv_id Y]
      _ = arrow X ≫ ((F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ arrow Y) := by rw [← assoc]
      _ = arrow X ≫ ((η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ arrow Y) := by rw [η.naturality]
      _ = (arrow X ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ (G.homF f ≫ arrow Y) := by rw [assoc, assoc]
      _ = Category.id _ ≫ G.homF f ≫ arrow Y := by rw [inv_hom_id X]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ arrow Y := by rw [id_comp]

have hX := h X
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX
    choose iX hiX using hX

    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY
    choose iY hiY using hY

    symm
    rw [← id_comp (G.homF f ≫ iY.inv), ← iX.inv_hom_id]
    rw [assoc, hiX, assoc, η.naturality, assoc]
    rw [← hiY, iY.hom_inv_id, comp_id]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX
    choose iX hiX using hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY
    choose iY hiY using hY
    calc
      iX.inv ≫ F.homF f
      _ = iX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ (iY.hom ≫ iY.inv) := by rw [iY.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
      _ = iX.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ iY.hom) ≫ iY.inv := by rw [assoc, assoc]
      _ = iX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ iY.inv := by rw [hiY, η.naturality]
      _ = (iX.inv ≫ iX.hom) ≫ G.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by rw [← hiX, assoc]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by rw [iX.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

have inv_hom_id : ∀ Z, arrow Z ≫ η.arrow Z = 𝟙 _ := fun Z => by
      have := h Z; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at this; choose f hf using this
      have : arrow Z = f.inv := by congr
      rw [this, ← hf]; exact f.inv_hom_id
    have hom_inv_id : ∀ Z, η.arrow Z ≫ arrow Z = 𝟙 _ := fun Z => by
      have := h Z; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at this; choose f hf using this
      have : arrow Z = f.inv := by congr
      rw [this, ← hf]; exact f.hom_inv_id
    suffices η.arrow X ≫ (arrow X ≫ F.homF f) = η.arrow X ≫ (G.homF f ≫ arrow Y) by
      rw [← Category.id_comp (arrow X ≫ F.homF f), ← inv_hom_id X, Category.assoc, this]
      rw [← Category.assoc, inv_hom_id X, Category.id_comp]
    rw [← Category.assoc, hom_inv_id X, Category.id_comp, Category.assoc, η.naturality]
    rw [← Category.assoc, hom_inv_id Y, Category.comp_id]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX; choose iX hiX using hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY; choose iY hiY using hY
    have : arrow X = iX.inv := rfl
    have : arrow Y = iY.inv := rfl
    rw [this, ‹arrow Y = iY.inv›]
    rw [← Category.comp_id (iX.inv ≫ F.homF f), ← iY.hom_inv_id, Category.assoc]
    rw [← hiY, ← η.naturality f, ← hiX, ← Category.assoc, iX.inv_hom_id, Category.id_comp]

let iX := Classical.choose (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h X))
    let iY := Classical.choose (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h Y))
    have hX : iX.hom = η.arrow X := Classical.choose_spec (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h X))
    have hY : iY.hom = η.arrow Y := Classical.choose_spec (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h Y))
    calc
      iX.inv ≫ F.homF f
      _ = iX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ iY.hom ≫ iY.inv      := by rw [← iY.hom_inv_id, comp_id, assoc]
      _ = iX.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ iY.inv  := by rw [hY]
      _ = iX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ iY.inv  := by rw [← η.naturality]
      _ = (iX.inv ≫ iX.hom) ≫ G.homF f ≫ iY.inv     := by rw [← hX, assoc]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ iY.inv                         := by rw [iX.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY
    let iX := Classical.choose hX
    let iY := Classical.choose hY
    have hiX : iX.hom = η.arrow X := Classical.choose_spec hX
    have hiY : iY.hom = η.arrow Y := Classical.choose_spec hY
    have defX : arrow X = iX.inv := rfl
    have defY : arrow Y = iY.inv := rfl
    rw [defX, defY, ←id_comp (G.homF f ≫ iY.inv), ←iX.inv_hom_id, assoc, hiX,
        ←assoc (η.arrow X), η.naturality, assoc, ←hiY, iY.hom_inv_id, comp_id]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX; choose iX hiX using hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY; choose iY hiY using hY
    have H : F.homF f ≫ iY.hom = iX.hom ≫ G.homF f := by
      rw [← hiY, ← hiX, η.naturality]
    rw [← comp_id (iX.inv ≫ F.homF f), ← iY.hom_inv_id, ← assoc (F.homF f), H]
    simp only [assoc, iX.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

have hX := h X
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX
    choose isoX h_isoX using hX
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY
    choose isoY h_isoY using hY
    rw [← Category.comp_id (isoX.inv ≫ F.homF f), ← isoY.hom_inv_id]
    rw [← assoc, ← assoc]
    congr 1
    rw [assoc, h_isoY, ← η.naturality f, ← h_isoX]
    rw [← assoc, isoX.inv_hom_id, Category.id_comp]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX; choose iX hiX using hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY; choose iY hiY using hY
    change iX.inv ≫ _ = _ ≫ iY.inv
    rw [← comp_id (iX.inv ≫ _), ← iY.hom_inv_id, assoc, ← assoc (F.homF f), hiY]
    rw [← η.naturality, assoc, ← hiX, ← assoc, iX.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY
    let iX := Classical.choose hX
    let iY := Classical.choose hY
    change iX.inv ≫ F.homF f = G.homF f ≫ iY.inv
    rw [← comp_id (iX.inv ≫ F.homF f), ← iY.hom_inv_id, Classical.choose_spec hY,
      assoc, assoc, η.naturality, ← Classical.choose_spec hX, ← assoc,
      iX.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX; choose iX hiX using hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY; choose iY hiY using hY
    change iX.inv ≫ F.homF f = G.homF f ≫ iY.inv
    rw [← Category.comp_id (iX.inv ≫ F.homF f), ← iY.hom_inv_id, assoc, assoc, hiY,
      η.naturality, ← hiX, ← assoc, iX.inv_hom_id, Category.id_comp]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX; choose iX hiX using hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY; choose iY hiY using hY
    have nat := η.naturality f
    rw [←hiX, ←hiY] at nat
    change iX.inv ≫ F.homF f = G.homF f ≫ iY.inv
    rw [←Category.comp_id (iX.inv ≫ F.homF f), ←iY.hom_inv_id, ←Category.assoc,
        ←nat, ←Category.assoc, ←Category.assoc, iX.inv_hom_id, Category.id_comp]

have hX := h X
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX
    choose iX hiX using hX
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY
    choose iY hiY using hY
    rw [← Category.comp_id (arrow X ≫ F.homF f), ← iY.hom_inv_id]
    rw [Category.assoc, ← Category.assoc (F.homF f)]
    rw [hiY, ← η.naturality, ← hiX]
    rw [← Category.assoc, ← Category.assoc]
    have : arrow X = iX.inv := rfl
    rw [this, iX.inv_hom_id, Category.id_comp]
    rfl

let pX := by have := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at this; exact this
    let pY := by have := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at this; exact this
    let iX := Classical.choose pX
    let iY := Classical.choose pY
    have hX : arrow X = iX.inv := rfl
    have hY : arrow Y = iY.inv := rfl
    rw [hX, hY, ← comp_id (iX.inv ≫ _), ← iY.hom_inv_id,
      Classical.choose_spec pY, assoc, assoc, η.naturality,
      ← assoc, ← Classical.choose_spec pX, iX.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY
    let iX := Classical.choose hX
    let iY := Classical.choose hY
    have hiX : iX.hom = η.arrow X := Classical.choose_spec hX
    have hiY : iY.hom = η.arrow Y := Classical.choose_spec hY
    change iX.inv ≫ _ = _ ≫ iY.inv
    rw [← Category.comp_id (iX.inv ≫ F.homF f), ← iY.hom_inv_id, Category.assoc,
      hiY, ← η.naturality, ← Category.assoc, ← hiX, iX.inv_hom_id, Category.id_comp]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX; choose iX hiX using hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY; choose iY hiY using hY
    change iX.inv ≫ F.homF f = G.homF f ≫ iY.inv
    rw [iX.inv_comp_eq, assoc, iY.eq_comp_inv]
    rw [hiX, hiY, η.naturality]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX; choose iX hiX using hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY; choose iY hiY using hY
    rw [← comp_id (iX.inv ≫ F.homF f), ← iY.hom_inv_id, assoc, assoc]
    rw [hiY, η.naturality, ← hiX, ← assoc, iX.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX; choose iX hiX using hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY; choose iY hiY using hY
    calc
      iX.inv ≫ F.homF f
      _ = iX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ iY.hom ≫ iY.inv := by rw [iY.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
      _ = iX.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ iY.hom) ≫ iY.inv := by rw [assoc]
      _ = iX.inv ≫ (iX.hom ≫ G.homF f) ≫ iY.inv := by rw [hiY, ← η.naturality, ← hiX]
      _ = (iX.inv ≫ iX.hom) ≫ G.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by rw [assoc, assoc]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by rw [iX.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX
    let iX := Classical.choose hX
    have hiX : iX.hom = η.arrow X := Classical.choose_spec hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY
    let iY := Classical.choose hY
    have hiY : iY.hom = η.arrow Y := Classical.choose_spec hY
    rw [← comp_id (F.homF f), ← iY.hom_inv_id, ← hiY, assoc, ← assoc (F.homF f),
      η.naturality.symm, assoc, ← assoc, ← hiX, iX.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX; choose iX hiX using hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY; choose iY hiY using hY
    calc
      iX.inv ≫ F.homF f
      _ = iX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ iY.hom ≫ iY.inv := by rw [iY.hom_inv_id, comp_id]
      _ = iX.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ iY.hom) ≫ iY.inv := by rw [assoc]
      _ = iX.inv ≫ (iX.hom ≫ G.homF f) ≫ iY.inv := by rw [hiY, η.naturality.symm, ← hiX]
      _ = (iX.inv ≫ iX.hom) ≫ G.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by rw [assoc]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ iY.inv                     := by rw [iX.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX
    let iX := Classical.choose hX
    have hiX : iX.hom = η.arrow X := Classical.choose_spec hX
    have arrowX : arrow X = iX.inv := rfl
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY
    let iY := Classical.choose hY
    have hiY : iY.hom = η.arrow Y := Classical.choose_spec hY
    have arrowY : arrow Y = iY.inv := rfl
    rw [arrowX, arrowY, ← id_comp (G.homF f ≫ iY.inv), ← iX.inv_hom_id, assoc, assoc, hiX]
    rw [η.naturality f]
    rw [← assoc, ← assoc, ← hiY, iY.hom_inv_id, comp_id]

dsimp
    generalize hix : Classical.choose (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h X)) = ix
    generalize hiy : Classical.choose (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h Y)) = iy
    have hx : ix.hom = η.arrow X := by rw [← hix]; exact Classical.choose_spec _
    have hy : iy.hom = η.arrow Y := by rw [← hiy]; exact Classical.choose_spec _
    rw [← comp_id (ix.inv ≫ _), ← iy.hom_inv_id, assoc, assoc]
    rw [← assoc (F.homF f), hy, ← η.naturality, ← hx]
    rw [assoc, ← assoc ix.inv, ix.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX
    let iX := Classical.choose hX
    have hiX : iX.hom = η.arrow X := Classical.choose_spec hX
    have inv_left : iX.inv ≫ η.arrow X = Category.id _ := by rw [←hiX]; exact iX.inv_hom_id

    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY
    let iY := Classical.choose hY
    have hiY : iY.hom = η.arrow Y := Classical.choose_spec hY
    have inv_right : η.arrow Y ≫ iY.inv = Category.id _ := by rw [←hiY]; exact iY.hom_inv_id

    rw [← Category.comp_id (F.homF f), ← inv_right, ← assoc, ← η.naturality, assoc, inv_left, Category.id_comp]

have inv_hom_id : ∀ Z, arrow Z ≫ η.arrow Z = 𝟙 _ := by
      intro Z
      have := h Z
      rw [iso_iff_isIso] at this
      choose f hf using this
      rw [← hf, f.inv_hom_id]
    have hom_inv_id : ∀ Z, η.arrow Z ≫ arrow Z = 𝟙 _ := by
      intro Z
      have := h Z
      rw [iso_iff_isIso] at this
      choose f hf using this
      rw [← hf, f.hom_inv_id]
    rw [← comp_id (arrow X ≫ F.homF f), ← hom_inv_id Y]
    simp only [assoc, ← η.naturality, inv_hom_id, comp_id, id_comp]

simp only [arrow]
    let iX := Classical.choose (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h X))
    let iY := Classical.choose (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h Y))
    have hiX : iX.hom = η.arrow X := Classical.choose_spec (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h X))
    have hiY : iY.hom = η.arrow Y := Classical.choose_spec (iso_iff_isIso.mp (h Y))
    calc
      iX.inv ≫ F.homF f
      _ = iX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ iY.hom ≫ iY.inv := by rw [← iY.hom_inv_id, comp_id, assoc]
      _ = iX.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ iY.hom) ≫ iY.inv := by rw [assoc]
      _ = iX.inv ≫ (iX.hom ≫ G.homF f) ≫ iY.inv := by rw [hiY, ← η.naturality, ← hiX]
      _ = (iX.inv ≫ iX.hom) ≫ G.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by rw [assoc]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by rw [iX.inv_hom_id, id_comp]
